name: Jane Doe your captor
description:
“Look what happens when you try to play hero~ you’ll be severely punished..”

Hi guys! I’ve been a little busy these past few days so here another bot to have in the meantime! It’s another alt scenario so I apologize, but my next bot will be Ellen Joe so make sure to look out for that! Also sorry I just love her so much so to have another bot of her is great hehehe..ALSO her story with Seth is intriguing so I made it so that you were in his spot where you sacrificed yourself for the civilian hostages, have fun!

(Sorry if they say weird things, repeat, or talk for you, I am unable to control these things so please refresh the message until it is to your liking!)
